description.value: All creatures in 15-foot cube originating from you take [[/damage 12 type=thunder]] damage and make Fortitude saves. Compare your weaving successes to their save successes. Those you beat are pushed 10 feet away from you. Unsecured objects are also pushed.

system.targetingSuccessScaling:
- 0 = fails
- 1 = 1/2 damage (6)
- 2 = full damage (12), pushed 10 feet
- 3 = +8 damage (20 total), pushed 10 feet + prone
---
system.weavingRoll: Air Potential + Air Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
